messages.text: about that quiet, you really speedran main character in that bookstore
crazy is you soft launching us between dusty novels
relax, im married to this book 😂
i can share custody if it behaves
u flirting with my paperback now
bold if u forgot we dated
you sure that wasnt my sister
no, that was you pretending not to see me
or i just wasnt checking for you
drinks thursday. you're gonna love this place
